summary: The task is complete in substance. The implementation provides Prisma/SQLite persistence, repo-local DB configuration, migrations, deterministic db preparation, idempotent protected endpoint seed defaults, repeatability coverage, and generated schema documentation that matches the implemented endpoint persistence shape. The work maps directly to endpoint-tool-management.md and does not appear to broaden into UI, MCP, REST, auth, OAuth, or reset behavior.
satisfied_exit_criteria: npm run db:prepare is implemented via scripts/db-prepare.mjs to create data/, apply Prisma migrations, generate Prisma Client, and run endpoint seed defaults.

db:prepare repeatability is covered by tests/unit/db-prepare.test.ts, which runs the command twice against an isolated SQLite database and verifies singular seeded endpoint, parameter, and response-case rows.

prisma/schema.prisma and migrations represent immutable endpoint IDs, names, titles/descriptions, enabled state, ordered parameters, response cases, default responses, delete codes, timestamps, and basic endpoint/case failure config fields.
docs/generated/db-schema.md matches the implemented Endpoint, EndpointParam, and ResponseCase models and documents the seed defaults and persistence assumptions.
The provided deterministic check summary reports all required gates passing: npm run db:prepare, npm run test:unit, and npm run verify.
